<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column G. Moving right is blocked by lava at row 02 column C, so I should go downward instead by turning left (to face down) and then move forward toward the lower open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

</thought>

</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

<action>
